scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),src=p.join(__dirname,'node_modules/@mlightcad/libredwg-web/wasm/libredwg-web.wasm'),dst=p.join(__dirname,'public/libredwg-web.wasm');if(fs.existsSync(src)&&!fs.existsSync(dst)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('[postinstall] Copied libredwg-web.wasm to public/')}else if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.warn('[postinstall] WARN: @mlightcad/libredwg-web wasm not found, skip copy')}else{console.log('[postinstall] libredwg-web.wasm already in public/')}"
